business.name: Juan Carpenter Inc
business.tagline: Expert Custom Carpentry in Balch Springs

seo.title: Juan Carpenter Inc | Expert Carpenter in Balch Springs, TX | Custom Woodwork & Repairs
seo.description: Juan Carpenter Inc offers expert carpentry in Balch Springs, TX. Custom cabinets, trim, decks, and repairs. Call (469) 347-5443 for a free quote.

hero.headline: Custom Carpentry That Transforms Your Home
hero.subheadline: From custom shelving to complete kitchen remodels, we bring precision and passion to every project.

featureSections.title: Built-In Cabinets & Shelving
featureSections.body: Maximize your space with custom cabinets and shelving designed to fit your style and needs. We craft each piece with premium materials and meticulous attention to detail.
featureSections.cardBody: Transform your kitchen or bath with custom cabinetry that combines beauty and durability.

featureSections.title: Crown Molding & Baseboards
featureSections.body: Add elegance to any room with expertly installed crown molding, baseboards, and wainscoting. Our precise cuts and seamless joints ensure a flawless finish.
featureSections.cardBody: Elevate your dining room or hallway with beautiful wainscoting tailored to your home.

whyChooseUs.title: Local Expertise

whyChooseUs.title: Premium Craftsmanship
whyChooseUs.description: Every cut, joint, and finish is executed with precision for lasting beauty.

whyChooseUs.title: Transparent Pricing

whyChooseUs.title: Reliable & Punctual

testimonials.quote: Our custom built-in bookshelf is the centerpiece of the house. Juan listened to our ideas and delivered beyond expectations.

cta.headline: Ready to Start Your Project?
cta.subheadline: Contact us today for a free, no-obligation estimate.

servicesPage.intro: From custom cabinets to deck building, our carpentry services cover every aspect of woodwork for your home or business. Each project is handled with skill, care, and a commitment to excellence.

services.title: Custom Cabinetry & Shelving
services.shortDescription: Bespoke cabinets and shelves tailored to your space and style.
services.longDescription: Our custom cabinetry service delivers functional art for your home. We design and build kitchen cabinets, bathroom vanities, entertainment centers, and built-in bookshelves that maximize storage and enhance aesthetics. Using premium hardwoods and modern hardware, we ensure every piece is durable and beautiful.
benefits: Custom design to match your décor

process.title: Consultation & Design
process.description: We visit your home, take measurements, and discuss your vision to create a custom plan.

process.title: Crafting & Assembly
process.description: Our skilled team builds your cabinets in our workshop using top-grade materials and joinery.

process.title: Installation & Finish
process.description: We install with precision, ensuring perfect fit and alignment, then apply final touches.

faqs.question: How long does a custom cabinet project take?
faqs.answer: Most projects take 2-4 weeks from design to installation, depending on complexity.

faqs.question: What materials do you use?
faqs.answer: We use solid hardwoods like oak, maple, and cherry, as well as high-quality plywood for durability.

services.title: Trim, Molding & Wainscoting
services.shortDescription: Add elegance with precision trim work.
services.longDescription: Enhance the character of your home with expert trim and molding installation. We specialize in crown molding, baseboards, chair rails, and wainscoting that transform plain rooms into refined spaces. Our precise miter cuts and seamless joints create a polished, professional look.

process.title: Design Selection
process.description: We help you choose molding profiles and layouts that complement your home's style.

process.title: Precision Cutting
process.description: Using advanced tools, we cut each piece to exact angles for flawless corners.

process.title: Installation & Touch-Up
process.description: We install securely, fill nail holes, and caulk seams for a seamless look.

faqs.question: Can you match existing trim?
faqs.description: Yes, we can replicate most trim styles and profiles to blend with your current moldings.

faqs.question: Do you paint the trim?
faqs.answer: We install trim ready for paint or stain. Painting can be arranged separately.

services.title: Deck & Patio Construction
services.shortDescription: Beautiful outdoor living spaces built to last.
services.longDescription: Create the perfect outdoor retreat with a custom deck or patio cover. We design and build decks using pressure-treated lumber, composite materials, or cedar. From simple platforms to multi-level designs with built-in seating, we ensure structural integrity and aesthetic appeal.

process.title: Site Evaluation & Design
process.description: We assess your yard, discuss your needs, and create a deck plan that fits.

process.title: Permitting & Prep
process.description: We handle necessary permits and prepare the site with proper footings.

process.title: Construction & Finish
process.description: Our team builds the deck with precise framing, secure decking, and a protective finish.

faqs.question: What decking materials do you recommend?
faqs.answer: We recommend composite for low maintenance, or cedar for natural beauty. Both are durable.

faqs.question: Do you build railings and stairs?
faqs.answer: Yes, we include code-compliant railings and stairs in all deck projects.

services.title: Repairs & Renovations
services.shortDescription: Fix, restore, and refresh your wood structures.
services.longDescription: Whether it's a rotting window frame, damaged baseboard, or an entire room renovation, our repair and renovation service breathes new life into your home. We handle everything from minor fixes to major structural repairs with the same attention to detail.

process.title: Inspection & Estimate
process.description: We inspect the damage and provide a detailed repair plan and quote.

process.title: Material Sourcing
process.description: We find matching materials to blend repairs with your existing woodwork.

process.title: Repair & Finish
process.description: We perform the repair, sand, and finish to match the surrounding area perfectly.

faqs.question: Can you repair water-damaged wood?
faqs.answer: Yes, we can replace rotted sections and treat the area to prevent future damage.

faqs.question: Do you offer emergency repairs?
faqs.answer: We prioritize urgent repairs and can often schedule within 24 hours.

about.headline: Crafting Quality Since 2008
about.mission: To provide Balch Springs and surrounding areas with exceptional carpentry that combines traditional craftsmanship with modern techniques, ensuring every project exceeds expectations.
story: Juan Carpenter Inc was founded in 2008 by Juan Martinez, a master carpenter with a passion for woodworking. Starting with small repair jobs, Juan built a reputation for reliability and precision that quickly spread through Balch Springs. Over the years, the company grew from a one-man operation to a full-service carpentry team, taking on complex custom builds and renovations.

Today, we continue Juan's legacy of quality. Our team of skilled craftsmen shares a commitment to excellence, using time-honored techniques and the finest materials. We treat every home like our own, ensuring that each project reflects our dedication to beauty, function, and durability.

coreValues.title: Craftsmanship
coreValues.description: We take pride in our work, delivering flawless results through skill and attention to detail.

coreValues.title: Integrity
coreValues.description: Honest pricing, transparent communication, and keeping our promises are the foundation of our business.

coreValues.title: Customer Focus
coreValues.description: Your vision guides every project. We listen, collaborate, and deliver exactly what you want.

coreValues.title: Community
coreValues.description: As a local business, we're invested in making Balch Springs a better place to live, one project at a time.

contact.headline: Let's Build Something Beautiful Together
contact.subheadline: Contact us for a free consultation and estimate.
